description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a matte black finish and a robust, angular receiver. It is equipped with a fixed stock that has a pronounced cheek rest and a wide buttplate for stability. The handguard and pistol grip are ergonomically shaped, providing a secure hold, while the magazine is a large, detachable box type, suggesting high capacity. The barrel is of standard length and appears to be free-floating, with a simple cylindrical muzzle and no visible muzzle device. The top of the receiver has a rail system for mounting optics, though no sighting system is currently attached. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary urban rifles.
description: A modern, matte black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, ergonomic grips, and a large detachable box magazine. The rifle has a standard barrel and a rail system for optics, but no sights or muzzle device are attached.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical barrel, wide handguard, and the symmetrical alignment of the stock and grip.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the fixed stock, large detachable box magazine, ergonomic pistol grip, and the rail system on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad buttplate of the stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the magazine, stock, and handguard contours.
